title: OpenHands/OpenHands
author: OpenHands
summary: OpenHands is an open-source framework for AI-driven software development, enabling LLM-based agents to autonomously perform coding tasks by interacting with real development environments (e.g., file systems, terminals, IDEs). It emphasizes tool use, code generation, and step-by-step reasoning in realistic dev workflows. The project supports reproducible agent evaluation and integration with modern dev tooling, bridging the gap between LLM capabilities and practical engineering automation.
